simple_types.name: EEPROM_Chip
simple_types.code:
type EEPROM_Chip is (EEC_MC24XX01,
                     EEC_MC24XX02,
                     EEC_MC24XX04,
                     EEC_MC24XX08,
                     EEC_MC24XX16,
                     EEC_MC24XX32,
                     EEC_MC24XX64,
                     EEC_MC24XX128,
                     …,
                     EEC_MC24XX1024
                    );

simple_types.name: EEPROM_Status
simple_types.code:
type EEPROM_Status is (
                       Ok,
                       Address_Out_Of_Range,
                       Data_Too_Big,
                       Block_Number_Invalid,
                       I2C_Not_Ok
                      );

enumeration_literals.name: Ok
enumeration_literals.description:
returned, if the requested memory address of
the EEPROM is out of range:
Mem_Addr > Mem_Addr_Size
In this case, no I2C operation is started

enumeration_literals.name: Address_Out_Of_Range
enumeration_literals.description:
returned, if the requested data to write is
too big.
This means, that the relation:
   Mem_Addr + Data'Size > Size_In_Bytes

enumeration_literals.name: Data_Too_Big
enumeration_literals.description:
If the block count is not one of:
1/2/4/8

enumeration_literals.name: Block_Number_Invalid
enumeration_literals.description:
Is set,
if anything is not OK with the I2C operation

record_types.name: EEPROM_Operation_Result

fields.name: E_Status
fields.description: Carries the last status of the I2C operation executed

tagged_types.name: EEPROM_Memory

fields.name: C_Type_of_Chip
fields.description: the size of addressing the EEPROM

fields.name: C_Delay_Callback
fields.description: the address of the EEPROM on the bus

fields.name: I2C_Addr
fields.description: the port where the EEPROM is connected to

access_types.name: Any_EEPROM
access_types.code: type Any_EEPROM is access all EEPROM'Class;

access_types.name: Any_EEPROM_Memory
access_types.code: type Any_EEPROM_Memory is access all EEPROM_Memory'Class;

access_types.name: Proc_Delay_Callback_MS
access_types.code: type Proc_Delay_Callback_MS is not null access procedure (MS : Integer);
